title: The Architecture Stack
description: A tall vertical pyramid divided into five labeled tiers from bottom to top: Model, Context, Tools, Skills, Agents. Each tier has a distinct color and a one-line descriptor. The pyramid conveys that each layer builds on the one below it, and together they form a complete autonomous system.

parts.title: The Five Layers
parts.description: A five-tier pyramid rendered top to bottom as: Agents (top), Skills, Tools, Context, Model (base). Each tier has a distinct background color, a bold layer name, and a short subtitle. A caption below reads: 'Each layer builds on the one below it. Together they form a complete autonomous business.'
